info.title: What If Web API Specification
info.description:
Note: the maximum length of the query string is limited to 2048 characters by default. The limit can be increased by changing maxQueryString and maxQueryStringLength options in the configuration file.

## Errors Logging

Error logs can be accessed at the following URL: [/GetErrors](../GetErrors)

### Supported Parameters:

- [/GetErrors](../GetErrors) provides error logs for the last 7 days.

- [/GetErrors/24](../GetErrors/24) provides error logs for the last 24 hours. If the number is greater than 168, error logs for the last week will be retrieved.

- [/GetErrors/id1027](../GetErrors/id1027) provides error log details where the ID is equal to 1027.

- [/GetErrors/idAfter1027](../GetErrors/idAfter1027) provides error log details where the ID is greater than 1027 but within the last week.

- [/GetErrors/m30](../GetErrors/m30) provides error logs for the last 30 minutes. If the number is greater than 10080, error logs for the last week will be retrieved.

- [/GetErrors/d15-07-2024](../GetErrors/d15-07-2024) provides error logs created on a specific date (15-07-2024, day-month-year format).

### Optional Parameter: `environment`

The `environment` parameter can be used to filter error logs specific to a particular environment. This parameter helps in tracking and analyzing errors based on the environment but is optional for retrieving error logs. Setting this parameter will only show error logs originating from the given envrionment.

 Supported values include:

- **Web**
- **WebMaster**
- **BackgroundWorker**
- **InsightPlusSyncService**

### Example Request with `environment` Parameter:
```http
GET /GetErrors?environment=BackgroundWorker
```

get.description: Gets list of projects, resources, tasks according to changes made in model. These entities reflect the date, inclusion, exclusion changes made to the model.

put.description: Clear all changes for the given model.

x-code-samples.source:
var t5Client = new TempusRestClient(sgUrl, token);
t5Client.ChangesClient.Reset(1).Wait();

put.description: Remove change for the given model.

x-code-samples.source:
var t5Client = new TempusRestClient(sgUrl, token);
t5Client.ChangesClient.Remove(1).Wait();

post.description: Create a generic resource for the given resource aggregation.
Create a named resource for the given resource aggregation.
Expand or contract given project by number of working days.
Replace resource for given assignment with other resources.
Shift given project by number of working days.
Shift given task by number of working days.
Expand or Contract given task by number of working days.

get.description: Gets the list of models that the user has access to in ascending order by Id.

x-code-samples.source:
var t5Client = new TempusRestClient(sgUrl, token);
t5Client.ModelsClient.GetModel(2).Result;

var t5Client = new TempusRestClient(sgUrl, token);
t5Client.ModelsClient.GetModel(2).Result;

get.description: Gets the list of changes for requested models.

parameters.name: modelIds
parameters.description: List of model ids separated by comma.

x-code-samples.source:
var t5Client = new TempusRestClient(sgUrl, token);
t5Client.ModelsClient.GetChanges(new List<int>{2,3}, false).Result;

get.description: Gets list of resources involved in model changes.
Gets list of projects involved in model changes.
Gets list of tasks involved in model changes.

x-code-samples.source:
var t5Client = new TempusRestClient(sgUrl, token);
t5Client.ModelsClient.GetTasks().Result;

id.description: Id of the aggregation field. Same as SuperGrid resource custom field Id.

name.description: Name of aggregation field. Can be null if the field do not exist.

changes.description: List of changes made to the model.

canRemove.description: Set if the change can be removed.

allocations.description: Assignment allocations in requested unit. By default same as dominant unit.

totalAllocation.description: Assignment total allocation in requested unit. By default same as dominant unit.

startDate.description: Start date of allocation. First day of period for requested time unit.

endDate.description: End date of allocation. First day of period for requested time unit.

days.description: Number of working days counting from 0.

isPartial.description: Set if the project is partially belong ot the model date range.

addedOrUpdatedByChangeId.description: Id of the last change action which added or updated the project.
Id of the last change action which added or updated the resource.

startDate.description: Start date of capacity.  First day of period for requested time unit.

endDate.description: End date of capacity. First day of period for requested time unit.

capacities.description: Resource capacities in requested unit. By default same as dominant unit.

projectId.description: Id of the project which task belongs to.

addedOrUpdatedByChangeId.description: Id of the last change action which added or updated the task.

customFieldId.description: Custom field Id of the lowest resource aggregation level.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values of the aggregation level where to add. Must be same as number of aggregation levels.

customFieldId.description: Custom field Id of the lowest resource aggregation level.

customFieldValues.description: Custom field values of the aggregation level where to add. Must be same as number of aggregation levels.

capacityPerDay.description: Capacity per day during the period.

projectId.description: Id of the project that was cloned.

taskId.description: Id of the task that was cloned.

allocations.description: Allocation by days from start to end date excluding weekends.

delta.description: Number of working days to shift. Positive number to expand and negative number to contract.
Number of working days to shift. Positive number to expand and negative number to contract.

totalAllocation.description: Total allocation of the replacement in Dominant Unit.

startDay.description: Start day of replacement. Number of working days starting from the first day of allocation. Calculated from 0.

endDay.description: End day of replacement. Number of working days starting from the first day of allocation. Calculated from 0.

delta.description: Number of working days to shift. Positive number to shift forward and negative number to shift backward.
Number of working days to shift. Positive number to shift forward and negative number to shift backward.

projectId.description: Id of the project that was split.

ownerId.description: User id of the model's creator.

isTeamResource.description: Is the resource a team resource.

projectId.description: Id of the project which task belongs to.

APIKey.description:
API authenticates an account by using the API token generated by the user account. A user with 'Use API' global role permission can request API token from profile screen. The access token must be sent in an HTTP authorization header with every API call. It's recommended to send API requests over HTTPS. API requests over HTTP are not safe and restricted by default. If you want to allow API access for HTTP - IsApiOverHttpEnabled flag must be set to 'true' in the configuration file. An api token represents a users and the users permissions. It must not be published or shared among multiple users.

Header example:

Authorization: Bearer 1-8051a5c4-3e6e-481e-9dd6-2f474d6061e3

OAuth.description:
API authenticates an account by using the OAuth JWT token generated by the oauth token endpoint at /oauth2/token. The access token must be sent in an HTTP authorization header with every API call. It's recommended to send API requests over HTTPS. API requests over HTTP are not safe and restricted by default. If you want to allow API access for HTTP - IsApiOverHttpEnabled flag must be set to 'true' in the configuration file. The token endpoint will never be accessible over HTTP for security reasons. An api token represents a users and the users permissions. It must not be published or shared among multiple users.

Header example:

Authorization: Bearer eyJhbGciOiJodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8yMDAxLzA0L3htbGRzaWctbW9yZSNobWFjLXNoYTI1NiIsImtpZCI6IjMyMiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJodHRwOi8vc2NoZW1hcy54bWxzb2FwLm9yZy93cy8yMDA1LzA1L2lkZW50aXR5L2NsYWltcy9uYW1lIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJodHRwOi8vc2NoZW1hcy54bWxzb2FwLm9yZy93cy8yMDA1LzA1L2lkZW50aXR5L2NsYWltcy9uYW1laWRlbnRpZmllciI6IjIiLCJuYmYiOjE2MTUyOTY3MzEsImV4cCI6MTYxNTM4MzEzMSwiaXNzIjoiaHR0cDovL2xvY2FsaG9zdCIsImF1ZCI6IjMyMiJ9.8Fhusr-wrtzKSscNiFJ--6ySyj6O3m8XuXpBbAuIUAY

Token endpoint Curl request example:

curl --location --request POST 'https://domain.com/oauth2/token' --header 'Accept: application/json' --header 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' --data-urlencode 'grant_type=password' --data-urlencode 'password=Password@1' --data-urlencode 'username=admin' --data-urlencode 'scope=SG'
